last_assistant_message:
Plan written to `docs/issues/LOCAL-1/2026-04-24-modernize-tictactoe-toolchain.md` and `issue.json` updated (`activePlan` set, `updated` bumped to the current UTC timestamp).

Key shape of the plan:
- **Only `tictactoe` has a `## <repo-name>` section.** `scorched-earth` is untouched by the feature description, so per the multi-repo rules I did not create a section for it.
- **Migration order is ordered to stay buildable after every step**: delete old toolchain → scaffold Vite/Vue 3/Tailwind/Vitest → migrate entry → extract game logic (with TDD) → migrate `App.vue`/`CellSymbol.vue` → add component tests → add E2E scenario → README/cleanup.
- **Validation commands are file-scoped** (`npx vitest run src/game.test.js`, `npx eslint src`, etc.), with `npx vitest run` as the full regression gate at the end, per the scoping rule.
- **`## E2E Tests`** references a new scenario `test_tictactoe_play_round.md` created in step 8 of the plan, since this feature touches UI.
- **New deps are enumerated** in the Notes section alongside the full removal list.
